meaning: n.[希神]俄瑞斯忒斯 (Agamemnon 之子)
examples: His son Orestes killed his mother and was pursued by the Furies.
In the first play, Agamemnon, the father of Orestes, is murdered by his wife, Clytemnestra.
At the trilogy's conclusion, Orestes is vindicated by Athena , the highest of all Greek goddesses.
Orestes and Electra must murder their own mother to avenge their father.
Klytaemnestra has been having dreams of Orestes, and of dying.
